description: RECORD/SAVE feature: capture acquired samples and export a sigrok .sr file for PulseView.

js_ops.name: globals
js_ops.anchor: let elapsedTimeText = '0 ms'; // Text to display elapsed time between buffer changes

js_ops.name: frame_flag
js_ops.anchor: previousPlotBuffer1 = currentBuffer; // Update the previous buffer
js_ops.payload: appParam_bufferUpdated = true; // Signal a genuinely new acquisition frame (consumed by the recorder after processWaveforms)

js_ops.name: snapshot_ch1
snapshot_ch2
js_ops.payload:
// Recording: snapshot the raw acquired (pre-interpolation) CH2 volts before further processing.
            if (appParam_isRecording && appParam_bufferUpdated) recPendingCH2 = CH2rawPoints.slice();

js_ops.name: commit_frame
js_ops.anchor: processWaveforms(); // do required operations with the waveform data

js_ops.name: enable_button
js_ops.payload: document.getElementById('button-record').disabled = false; // Recording can start any time after START

js_ops.name: disable_button
js_ops.payload: if (!appParam_isRecording) document.getElementById('button-record').disabled = true; // keep enabled if a recording is still open (so it can be SAVEd)

js_ops.name: functions

record_button_lines: <button class="control-button button-big-power" id="button-record" onclick="toggleRecording()" style="left: 300px; top: 0px;" disabled="">

jszip.comment: <!-- Bundled JSZip 3.10.1 (inline, for offline .sr / PulseView export) -->
